task_description: Implement the Dual-Microphone MVDR Beamforming feature following the spec at docs/specs/dual-mic-mvdr-beamforming.md. Creates a header-only C++ MVDR beamformer module, integrates stereo capture via Oboe, adds JNI/Kotlin/Dart bridges for runtime enable/disable, all in 5 phases as specified.

verification.summary: clang++ -std=c++17 -fsyntax-only passes cleanly on mvdr_beamformer.h (standalone, exit code 0 with no errors). All 5 spec phases implemented: Phase 1 (header-only C++ module), Phase 2 (stereo Oboe capture with mono fallback), Phase 3 (JNI bridge), Phase 4 (Kotlin + Dart bridge), Phase 5 (syntax validation). CMakeLists.txt was NOT touched. beamformingEnabled defaults to false (retrocompatible). No Android NDK available for full build verification, but the header-only module compiles correctly with standard library headers only.
